summary: Phase 5 Gap Closure testing complete. All 5 new features (DonorIQ, Virtual Terminal, Refund, QR Codes, Cover Fees) working correctly. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.

issues: HTML hydration warnings: <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, caused by React wrapper spans

seed_data_creation: Test donations created with TEST_ prefix during pytest (TEST_VT_Donor, TEST_VT_CoverFees, TEST_Refund_Donor, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 gap closure features fully tested and working. DonorIQ shows 193 donors across 6 engagement stages. Virtual Terminal processes donations with cover_fees support. Refund creates negative donation entries. QR Codes returns 8 giving links. SolomonPayForm cover_fees toggle adds 2.5% + $0.30.

donoriq_engagement_stages.details: GET /api/admin/solomonpay/donor-insights returns 6 stages (once, occasional, regular, recurring, at_risk, lapsed) with donor counts. UI shows DonorIQ panel with 193 total donors: 1 Recurring, 45 Regular, 91 Occasional, 55 First-Time, 0 At Risk, 1 Lapsed

virtual_terminal.details: POST /api/admin/solomonpay/virtual-terminal processes donations with person_name, amount, fund_name, payment_method, cover_fees. UI modal opens from dashboard with all required fields. Cover fees checkbox adds 2.5% + $0.30

refund_capability.details: POST /api/admin/solomonpay/refund/{donation_id} refunds donation and creates negative entry. Prevents double refund (400). Returns 404 for nonexistent. UI shows Refund buttons on completed transactions and 'refunded' status badge

qr_code_giving.details: GET /api/admin/solomonpay/qr-codes returns QR code URLs for all active funds. UI shows 'QR Code Giving - 8 giving links available' panel on dashboard

cover_fees.details: GivingDonateRequest schema has cover_fees: bool field. SolomonPayForm shows 'Cover processing fees' checkbox that adds 2.5% + $0.30 (verified: $50 donation shows +$1.55 fee). Portal giving endpoint accepts cover_fees field

mocked_apis.payout_processing: MOCKED - creates records but doesn't process actual Stripe payouts
mocked_apis.refund_processing: MOCKED - updates status and creates negative entry but doesn't reverse Stripe charges
